title: carex karlongensis
intro: Carex karlongensis, also known as Karlong sedge, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae, native to parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues. Carex karlongensis is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and teas, and can also be dried and used in traditional medicine in various forms.
